description: Create a family tree diagram of the British Royal House of Windsor (25 members, 4 generations) in draw.io using the data from ~/Desktop/windsor_family_data.csv. The diagram must include a shape for each member labeled with their Name and Birth Year (e.g., 'Queen Elizabeth II\nb. 1926') arranged in a hierarchical layout. Use solid lines for parent-child relationships and dashed lines for marriage/spouse relationships. The project must contain two pages: a 'Family Tree' page and a 'Legend' page explaining the line styles. Save the diagram as ~/Desktop/royal_family_tree.drawio and export the first page as ~/Desktop/royal_family_tree.png.
